jobs.title: Marketing Coordinator
jobs.industry: AI Platforms | Market Research | Digital Products
jobs.roleOverview: We are seeking a Marketing Coordinator to manage and execute marketing initiatives across multiple products, including AI platforms, research solutions, and digital services.
responsibilities: Plan and execute digital marketing activities across multiple products
Manage social media accounts and ensure consistent content posting
Create and maintain marketing calendars aligned with business strategy
Coordinate development of marketing materials such as creatives, brochures, presentations, and emailers
Execute and monitor email marketing campaigns
Track marketing performance and prepare basic analytics reports
Provide data-driven suggestions for marketing improvements
Support SEO initiatives including keyword research and on-page optimization
Coordinate and attend industry exhibitions or trade shows (approximately once per month)
Ensure timely organization, execution, and delivery of marketing initiatives
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or related field preferred
2–5 years of experience in digital marketing or marketing coordination
Strong understanding of digital marketing channels and analytics
Good working knowledge of SEO principles and best practices
Experience handling multiple products or brands is an advantage
Strong organizational, communication, and coordination skills
Proactive, creative, and solution-oriented mindset
Candidate must be based in Mumbai

jobs.title: Marketplace Manager
jobs.roleOverview: We are looking for an active and detail-oriented professional to manage and grow our presence across B2B and B2C marketplaces.
responsibilities: Manage product listings on Alibaba, IndiaMART, TradeIndia, Amazon, Flipkart
Optimize product titles, descriptions, keywords, and specifications
Develop pricing strategy across marketplaces
Create A+ content and enhanced listings
Manage product listings on company website
Identify and onboard new B2B, B2C, and D2C platforms
Handle quick commerce platforms like Zepto, Blinkit, Instamart
Track marketplace metrics and prepare weekly reports
requirements: 1–2 years experience in e-commerce or marketplace management
Hands-on experience with Amazon, Flipkart, IndiaMART, Alibaba
Understanding of SEO keywords, pricing, and offers
Proactive, organized, execution-focused
Mumbai-based candidate mandatory

jobs.title: SEO Specialist
jobs.industry: Digital Marketing | AI Platforms | Online Services
jobs.roleOverview: We are looking for a results-driven SEO Specialist to improve our website visibility, organic rankings, and lead generation performance across multiple digital platforms.
responsibilities: Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis
Develop and implement on-page and off-page SEO strategies
Optimize website content, meta tags, headings, and internal linking
Perform technical SEO audits and coordinate with developers for fixes
Build high-quality backlinks using ethical SEO practices
Monitor website traffic, rankings, and performance using SEO tools
Prepare monthly SEO performance reports
Stay updated with Google algorithm changes and industry trends
Improve website loading speed and user experience metrics
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, IT, or related field preferred
2–4 years of hands-on SEO experience
Strong knowledge of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO
Experience with tools like Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, or Ahrefs
Understanding of HTML, CMS platforms, and basic technical structure
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Mumbai-based candidate preferred

jobs.title: Social Media Manager
jobs.roleOverview: We are seeking a creative and strategic Social Media Manager to build brand awareness, increase engagement, and drive leads across multiple social platforms.
responsibilities: Develop and execute social media strategies across platforms
Create and schedule engaging posts, reels, and stories
Manage company accounts on LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter
Monitor audience engagement and respond to comments/messages
Collaborate with designers and content writers for creatives
Run paid ad campaigns and monitor performance
Track social media metrics and prepare monthly reports
Stay updated with social media trends and platform updates
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
2–5 years experience in social media management
Strong understanding of content strategy and audience targeting
Experience running Meta and LinkedIn ads preferred
Creative mindset with strong communication skills
Ability to analyze performance data and optimize campaigns
Mumbai-based candidate mandatory
